prestazioni: Engine: 4N16 2.4L MIVEC Turbo Diesel (133kW stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression for E85 compatibility), and ACL Race Series bearings. Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collector and MagnaFlow 304 stainless muffler.

Drivetrain: Reinforced R15MY16 transfer case with Quaife ATB helical LSD (front) and Cusco Type-RS 2-way LSD (rear). Upgraded clutch system with Sachs Performance twin-disc ceramic clutch (300Nm+ torque capacity) and PWR radiator with dual 12" SPAL fans for thermal management.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with 25mm front lift and 20mm rear lift for rally clearance. Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer) for control arms, subframe, and sway bars. Custom-fabricated front and rear skid plates from 5mm Alucobond with integrated recovery points (rated for 10,000kg snatch load).
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon-fiber widebody kit by Rocket Bunny (LWB-specific, +120mm fenders) with integrated vented hood for intercooler airflow. Rear diffuser by Voltex (Type-3, 3D carbon) and front splitter with adjustable canards (Aeroflow Dynamics).

Lighting: Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (50" curved, 40,000 lumens) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack (Prinsu Designs). Baja Designs Squadron Pro auxiliary lights (amber fog, white spot) with custom CNC-machined aluminum mounts (6061-T6).

Exterior: Full XPEL Stealth PPF wrap with custom rally livery (3M 1080 vinyl, "Mitsubishi Racing Lime" with matte black accents). Method MR701 wheels (17x9 +18 offset) with BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17). Custom rear bumper with integrated swing-out spare tire carrier (RotopaX 20L fuel cell mount).
